_note: Harness generation. The mock returns harness source; the task layer attempts to compile it in the sandbox. Keep the source trivially compilable so the build path succeeds in CI.

findings.title: libFuzzer harness for {{function|parse_request}}
findings.summary: Generated a libFuzzer harness that feeds fuzz input into {{function|parse_request}}; compiles cleanly.
findings.reasoning: Wrapped the parser entry point in LLVMFuzzerTestOneInput, copying the fuzz buffer into a NUL-terminated heap buffer before the call.

suggested_followups.label: Find other parsers with the same shape
